text: American Journalist Abby Martin on her visit to Israel: The whole world has to isolate this rogue… state. Shame anyone who goes there. You cannot expect change in a society this far gone. We’re seeing essentially the fourth Reich today marching forward.
text_zh: 美国记者艾比·马丁谈其访问以色列：全世界必须孤立这个流氓…国家。任何前往那里的人都应感到羞耻。你不能指望一个已沦落至此的社会发生改变。我们今天看到的实质上是第四帝国在向前迈进。

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇸🇴 Turkish deep-sea drilling vessel Çağrı Bey was seen on the coast of Mogadishu. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇸🇴 土耳其深海钻井船Çağrı Bey在摩加迪沙海岸被目击。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 💬 Opponents of Iran will never achieve the cessation of uranium enrichment by Tehran - the Head of the Atomic Energy Organization of the Islamic Republic Mohammad Eslami. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💬 伊朗原子能组织负责人穆罕默德·埃斯拉米表示，伊朗的反对者永远无法实现德黑兰停止铀浓缩。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The European Union’s foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas said the ceasefire with Iran must be expanded to include Lebanon. She also stated that Hezbollah must fulfil its commitment to disarm. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯表示，与伊朗的停火必须扩大至黎巴嫩。她还声明，真主党必须履行其解除武装的承诺。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 Handala hacking group hacked the phone of a former IDF Chief Herzi Halevi Among the leaked materials is a video showing a secret visit to Jordan where Halevi presented a dagger from a Jordanian soldier killed in 1967 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 Handala黑客组织入侵了前以色列国防军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机。泄露材料中包含一段视频，显示其秘密访问约旦，期间哈勒维展示了一把来自1967年被杀的约旦士兵的匕首。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The head of Iran’s Atomic Energy Organisation, Mohammad Eslami, said the "enemy" will not succeed in limiting Iran’s nuclear programme. “The enemies’ demands to restrict Iran’s enrichment programme will not be achieved,” he stated. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗原子能组织负责人穆罕默德·埃斯拉米表示，“敌人”不会成功限制伊朗的核计划。他声明：“敌人限制伊朗浓缩计划的要求将不会实现。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah releases footage showing launches of Noor anti-ship cruise missiles, allegedly targeting an Israeli Navy vessel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布视频，展示发射“努尔”反舰巡航导弹，据称目标是以色列海军舰艇。@wfwitness

text: 🇯🇴 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Handala hacked former IOF Chief Herzi Halevi’s phone and released photos/videos. The leaks show a secret Jordan visit where Halevi, in civilian clothes, presented a dagger from a Jordanian soldier killed in 1967.
text_zh: 🇯🇴 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 汉达拉组织黑入前以色列国防军总参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机，并泄露了照片/视频。泄露内容显示了一次秘密约旦之行，哈勒维身着便装，展示了一把来自1967年被杀的约旦士兵的匕首。

text: Hezbollah shows footage claiming it targeted an Israeli Navy vessel with Noor anti-ship cruise missiles.
text_zh: 真主党公布画面，声称使用“努尔”反舰巡航导弹袭击了以色列海军舰艇。

text: Iran-linked hacking group Handala hacked former IDF Chief Herzi Halevi’s phone and released photos/videos. The leaks show a secret Jordan visit where Halevi, in civilian clothes, presented a dagger from a Jordanian soldier killed in 1967. Other personal and sensitive materials were also shared online.
text_zh: 与伊朗相关的黑客组织汉达拉黑入前以色列国防军总参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机，并泄露了照片/视频。泄露内容揭示了一次秘密约旦访问，哈勒维身着便装，展示了一把来自1967年阵亡的约旦士兵的匕首。其他个人及敏感材料也被上传至网络。

text: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Reuters initially claimed Israeli forces had martyred Hezbollah Sheikh Naim Qassem, but quickly corrected it: the martyred individual was his nephew and personal secretary, Ali Yusuf Harshi.
text_zh: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 路透社最初声称以色列部队使真主党谢赫纳伊姆·卡西姆殉难，但迅速更正：殉难者是其侄子和私人秘书阿里·优素福·哈尔希。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Health Minister Rakan Nassereddine stated that at least 203 people were killed and more than 1,000 wounded in Israeli airstrikes yesterday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩卫生部长拉坎·纳赛雷丁表示，昨日以色列空袭造成至少203人死亡，超过1000人受伤。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian army spokesman Mohammad Akrami-Nia said Tehran forced the U.S. to accept a ceasefire by showing strength, and that America’s position has been weakened regionally and internationally. He accused Washington of having no logical reason for the war and of failing to provide a convincing narrative. “America had no logical reason for this war. No one – even in America itself, among American elites, political officials, and the American people – was convinced or accepted America’s narrative of why the war happened. Our schools were targeted. The Jebel School in Minab was hit. More than 168 of our children were martyred there. More than 130 of our cultural and historical sites were targeted. Hospitals, pharmaceutical facilities, health centres, and civilian infrastructure were also hit. The way this war was fought has created a major challenge for America, alongside the question of why, and has weakened America’s position in the international system and in the world. We will certainly see more of its effects in the future.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗军队发言人穆罕默德·阿克拉米-尼亚表示，德黑兰通过展示实力迫使美国接受停火，且美国在地区和国际上的地位已被削弱。他指责华盛顿对这场战争没有合理理由，也未能提供令人信服的说法。“美国发动这场战争毫无逻辑依据。没有人——甚至在美国国内，包括美国精英、政治官员和美国人民——被说服或接受美国关于战争为何发生的说法。我们的学校成为袭击目标。米纳布的杰贝尔学校遭到袭击。超过168名我们的孩子在那里殉难。超过130处我们的文化和历史遗址成为目标。医院、制药设施、医疗中心和民用基础设施也遭到打击。这场战争的进行方式，连同其缘由问题，给美国带来了重大挑战，并削弱了美国在国际体系和世界上的地位。未来我们肯定会看到更多其影响。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed a series of attacks on Thursday morning in response to alleged Israeli ceasefire violations. The group said it struck a Nemer vehicle in Taybeh with a guided missile at 8:42am, and hit an Israeli force inside a house in the Taybeh project with an attack drone at 8:45am. Rocket barrages were later fired at Kiryat Shmona (10:00am) and at Kiryat Shmona and Metula (10:50am). Hezbollah stated it had adhered to the ceasefire but would continue its response until "US‑Israeli aggression stops. " @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣称于周四上午发动了一系列袭击，以回应据称以色列违反停火的行为。该组织表示，上午8:42在泰贝用导弹袭击了一辆内默尔车辆，并于上午8:45用攻击无人机袭击了泰贝项目区内一栋房屋中的以色列部队。随后，火箭弹袭击了基利亚特什莫纳（上午10:00）以及基利亚特什莫纳和梅图拉（上午10:50）。真主党称其一直遵守停火，但将继续回应，直到“美以侵略停止”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s Ports and Maritime Organisation has announced two designated safe routes for vessels entering and exiting the Strait of Hormuz, established to avoid the potential presence of sea mines in the area. It is a rare official reference to mining at the strategic waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗港口和海事组织宣布了两条指定的安全航线，供船只进出霍尔木兹海峡，设立目的是避免该区域可能存在的水雷。这是对这一战略水道布雷的罕见官方提及。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇸🇦 Bloomberg : Hours after the US‑Iran ceasefire, several oil tankers – including three Chinese supertankers (two linked to Cosco) and a Saudi vessel – sailed east toward the Strait of Hormuz, joining a pool of vessels waiting to exit the Persian Gulf. Shipowners said details for safe transit remain unclear. Iran has warned via radio transmissions that vessels still require Tehran’s permission to cross the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇸🇦 彭博社：美伊停火几小时后，多艘油轮——包括三艘中国超级油轮（两艘与中远集团有关）和一艘沙特船只——向东驶向霍尔木兹海峡，加入等待驶出波斯湾的船只群。船主表示，安全通行的细节仍不明确。伊朗已通过无线电广播警告，船只仍需获得德黑兰的许可才能穿越海峡。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Hypocrite Emirates strikes again, ‘Strongest Condemnation’ for Israeli Consulate shooting . Dead silence while Israel drops hundreds dead in Lebanon.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 伪善的阿联酋再次出击，对以色列领事馆枪击事件表示‘最强烈谴责’。而对以色列在黎巴嫩造成数百人死亡却保持死寂。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇯🇴 Former Israeli Chief of Staff Herzi Halevi presents the Jordanian Chief of Staff Yousef Huneiti a dagger of a Jordanian soldier who was killed in the 1967 Six-Day War. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇯🇴 以色列前总参谋长赫尔齐·哈莱维向约旦总参谋长优素福·胡奈提赠送了一把在1967年六日战争中阵亡的约旦士兵的匕首。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF Spokesperson shares details of the eliminated targets during yesterday’s airstrikes in Lebanon: The IDF attacked and eliminated yesterday Ali Yosef Harshi, the personal secretary of the Secretary-General of the terrorist organization Hezbollah, and the nephew of Naim Qassem in the Beirut area. Harshi was close and a personal advisor to Hezbollah Secretary-General Naim Qassem, and played a central role in managing his office and security. During the night, the IDF attacked two main crossings used by Hezbollah terrorists to move from north to south Litani in Lebanon, transferring thousands of weapons, rockets, and launchers. About 10 weapons warehouses, launchers, and headquarters used by Hezbollah in southern Lebanon were also attacked. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发言人分享昨日黎巴嫩空袭中被消灭目标的细节：以军在贝鲁特地区袭击并消灭了恐怖组织真主党秘书长的私人秘书阿里·优素福·哈尔希，他是纳伊姆·卡西姆的侄子。哈尔希与真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆关系密切，是其个人顾问，并在其办公室管理和安保工作中扮演核心角色。夜间，以军袭击了真主党恐怖分子用于从北向南穿越黎巴嫩利塔尼河的两个主要通道，这些通道曾运输数千件武器、火箭弹及发射器。此外，还袭击了真主党在黎巴嫩南部使用的大约10个武器仓库、发射器和总部。@wfwitness

text: Australia's Prime Minister Anthony Albanese: The Australian government also firmly believes that the ceasefire has to apply to Lebanon as well.
text_zh: 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯：澳大利亚政府也坚信，停火协议必须同样适用于黎巴嫩。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Zionist occupation forces unleashed at least 137 strikes in 30 minutes (~100 strikes in the first 10 minutes) on Wednesday, continuing into Thursday. The savage assault hit 68 locations by jets, 14 towns by drones, and 18 villages by artillery in southern Lebanon. Thursday targets : Khiam (twice), Zrarieh, Bint Jbeil villages (Jmaijmeh, Ghandourieh, Safad al-Battikh, Kafra, Deir Antar), Majdal Selm, Tayr Debba, and artillery on Haris. This desperate terror killed at least 254 martyrs and wounded over 1,165 - the deadliest day since hostilities resumed after the November 2024 ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 犹太复国主义占领军于周三至周四期间，在30分钟内发动至少137次袭击（前10分钟约100次）。此次野蛮攻击中，战机轰炸68处地点，无人机袭击14个城镇，炮火覆盖黎巴嫩南部18个村庄。周四袭击目标包括：希亚姆（两次）、兹拉里耶、宾特朱拜勒地区村庄（杰迈杰迈、甘杜里耶、萨法德巴提赫、卡夫拉、代尔安塔尔）、马杰达勒塞勒姆、泰尔代巴，并对哈里斯进行炮击。这场绝望的恐怖行动导致至少254名烈士遇难，超1165人受伤，成为自2024年11月停火后敌对行动重启以来最致命的一天。

text: CORRECTION: Israel says it killed Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem’s nephew.
text_zh: 更正：以色列称其击毙了真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆的侄子。

text: Worker Unions Protest Layoffs & Debt as Senegal Debt Crisis Deepens Hundreds protested rising costs & layoffs in Dakar Wednesday as Senegal faces a $13 billion debt crisis & 132% debt-to-GDP ratio, highlighting pressure on the Sonko-Faye government. READ MORE
text_zh: 工会抗议裁员与债务，塞内加尔债务危机加剧。周三，数百人在达喀尔抗议成本上升和裁员问题，塞内加尔正面临130亿美元债务危机及132%的债务与GDP比率，凸显桑科-法耶政府承受的压力。阅读更多

text: Iran has released an official map of required shipping routes in the Strait of Hormuz. It shows vessels must travel closer to Iran’s coast, and confirms for the first time that usual routes are now considered dangerous due to the risk of naval mines.
text_zh: 伊朗发布了霍尔木兹海峡官方指定航线图。图中显示船只必须更靠近伊朗海岸航行，并首次确认常规航线因水雷风险现被视为危险区域。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranians across the country mark the 40th day of mourning for Ayatollah Khamenei, the late Leader of the Islamic Revolution.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗全国民众悼念伊斯兰革命已故领袖哈梅内伊逝世40天。

text: 🇪🇬 🇮🇱 Today is the anniversary of the bombing of Bahr al-Baqar school; where Israeli Phantoms massacred 46 Egyptian children in the classroom on 8 April 1970. This is not a "military error," but part of the Zionist child-killing doctrine to break the will of nations. From Bahr al-Baqar to Minab and Gaza, the killer is the same, only the geography has changed.
text_zh: 🇪🇬 🇮🇱 今天是巴赫尔巴卡尔学校轰炸事件周年纪念日；1970年4月8日，以色列幻影战机在教室内屠杀了46名埃及儿童。这并非“军事失误”，而是犹太复国主义杀害儿童以摧毁民族意志的教条一部分。从巴赫尔巴卡尔到米纳布和加沙，凶手从未改变，只是地理坐标变了。

text: BIG: Israel’s cabinet secretly approved 34 new settlements in the West Bank, a record expansion passed during the war. This would raise the total number of approved settlements from 69 to 103. The decision was kept classified to avoid U.S. pressure. The IDF raised manpower concerns and suggested a phased rollout, but was overruled. Some settlements will be built inside Palestinian enclaves, and—under a secret clause—water and electricity infrastructure will begin even before land legalization. Source: Inon Yttach
text_zh: 重大消息：以色列内阁秘密批准在约旦河西岸新建34个定居点，创下战争期间通过的扩张纪录。这将使已批准的定居点总数从69个增至103个。该决定被列为机密以避免美国施压。以色列国防军提出人力担忧并建议分阶段推进，但被否决。部分定居点将建在巴勒斯坦飞地内，且根据秘密条款，水电基础设施将在土地合法化前动工。消息来源：伊农·伊塔赫

text: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Professor Marandi on rumors that China asked Iran to accept the ceasefire: “I doubt that such a thing is true, because what was important for Iran was for Trump to give up his 15-point plan and to recognize Iran’s 10-point plan.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 马兰迪教授就中国要求伊朗接受停火的传闻表示：“我怀疑此事的真实性，因为对伊朗而言，关键是让特朗普放弃其15点计划并承认伊朗的10点计划。”

text: 🇺🇦 "I'm ready to meet with Putin": Zelensky stated that he does not plan to withdraw troops from Donbass. ➡️ On Donbass: 'We can't just discuss the transfer of Donbass. If we leave it to Russia, they will occupy our most protected positions without losses. Creating new fortified lines could take a year or even a year and a half. They will be able to attack Kharkov and other cities that make a significant contribution to our GDP. And this will lead to a split in society, and any internal division is a key goal of Putin and a threat to our independence.' ➡️ On elections: 'Holding them now contradicts our law. Moreover, we need to ensure the safety of people and soldiers who are supposed to vote. How can this be done during an attack?' ➡️ On Donbass before the war: 'Of course, there were mistakes, everyone makes mistakes. We need to return to the 90s and the early 2000s, but even then, Putin would have found a pretext for an invasion.' ➡️ On Trump: 'Who has better relations with Trump than I do? I think we have a good relationship because I'm one of the few who tell him the truth. Not many people can tell the US president that he's not always right. We need US support not only military, but also the experience we've gained over these years of war, which is also useful to them.' 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 “我愿与普京会面”：泽连斯基声明不计划从顿巴斯撤军。➡️ 关于顿巴斯：‘我们不能只讨论顿巴斯的移交。若将其让给俄罗斯，他们将毫无损失地占领我们最坚固的防线。建造新防御工事可能需要一年甚至一年半。届时他们将能进攻哈尔科夫等对我国GDP贡献重大的城市。这将导致社会分裂，而任何内部分裂都是普京的关键目标，也威胁我国独立。’➡️ 关于选举：‘现在举行选举违反我国法律。此外，我们需要保障民众和士兵的投票安全。在遭受攻击时如何实现？’➡️ 关于战前顿巴斯：‘当然存在错误，人人都会犯错。我们需要回溯到90年代和21世纪初，但即便那时，普京也会找到入侵借口。’➡️ 关于特朗普：‘谁与特朗普的关系比我更好？我认为我们关系良好，因为我是少数敢对他说真话的人。没多少人能告诉美国总统他并非总是正确。我们需要美国的支持不仅是军事援助，还包括这些年战争中积累的经验，这对他们也有价值。’🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 Spanish Foreign Minister says Spain is reopening its embassy in Tehran.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 西班牙外交大臣表示西班牙正在重开驻德黑兰大使馆。

text: NEW: Spain will reopen its embassy in Tehran.
text_zh: 最新：西班牙将重新开放其在德黑兰的大使馆。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ Tucker Carlson on reopening the Strait of Hormuz: If you are the strongest military in the world, why can’t you force Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz? We’re really not as powerful as we said we were. That’s bad for us, but it’s also dangerous because it invites aggression. We need to fix that by being honest about what just happened. No more lying.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ 塔克·卡尔森谈重开霍尔木兹海峡：如果你是世界上最强大的军队，为什么不能迫使伊朗开放霍尔木兹海峡？我们实际上并没有我们所说的那么强大。这对我们不利，但也危险，因为它会招致侵略。我们需要通过诚实地面对刚刚发生的事情来纠正这一点，不再撒谎。

text: Nearly half of the U.S. data centers planned for 2026 are at risk of delay or cancellation, mainly due to transformer shortages and grid constraints. Despite tech giants planning $650 billion+ in AI spending, physical infrastructure can’t keep up. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 计划于2026年建成的美国数据中心近半数面临延误或取消的风险，主要原因是变压器短缺和电网限制。尽管科技巨头计划在AI上投入超过6500亿美元，但实体基础设施跟不上。来源：彭博社

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ Tucker Carlson on Israel's violation of ceasefire: Why can’t the United States get its proxy, its client state… under control? Why can’t this president or any president say no to Israel? We have a right to know why.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ 塔克·卡尔森谈以色列违反停火协议：为什么美国不能控制其代理人、其附庸国……？为什么这位总统或任何总统都不能对以色列说不？我们有权知道原因。

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 Spanish Foreign Minister says Spain is reopening its embassy in Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 西班牙外交部长表示，西班牙正在重新开放其在德黑兰的大使馆。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Launches from Hezbollah" Intercepted
text_zh: ↩️ 回复战争前线观察者：“真主党发射的火箭弹”已被拦截

text: Tucker Carlson: If you are the strongest military in the world, why can’t you force Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz? We’re really not as powerful as we said we were. How did this ‘primitive country’ just humiliate us? That’s bad for us, but it’s also dangerous because it invites aggression. We need to fix that by being honest about what just happened. No more lying.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：如果你是世界最强军队，为何不能迫使伊朗开放霍尔木兹海峡？我们其实并不像自己宣称的那样强大。这个‘原始国家’是如何羞辱我们的？这对我们不利，但也危险，因为它会招致侵略。我们需要通过诚实面对刚发生的事来纠正这一点，不再撒谎。

text: “Not Our Problem” - U.S. Shrugs Off Lebanon Amid Ceasefire Rift The U.S.-Iran ceasefire is already fraying, with Vice President JD Vance dismissing Lebanon as irrelevant to ceasefire. Tehran has halted shipping via Hormuz & have threatened retaliation, claiming the U.S. "can't continue the war through Israel" if it wants the ceasefire. READ MORE
text_zh: “与我们无关”——美国在停火分歧中对黎巴嫩漠然置之 美伊停火协议已现裂痕，副总统JD·万斯将黎巴嫩视为与停火无关。德黑兰已停止通过霍尔木兹的航运，并威胁报复，声称美国若想维持停火，就“不能通过以色列继续战争”。阅读更多

text: Tucker Carlson on Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon: You know what the name of the military operation was? Eternal Darkness. Eternal darkness… is a euphemism for hell. That’s exactly what Israel brought to Christians in Lebanon. These are civilians who were murdered… using American weapons and American tax dollars. All of it stopped by Operation Eternal Darkness targeting civilians.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈以色列在黎巴嫩的空中打击：你知道这次军事行动的名称吗？永恒黑暗。永恒黑暗……是地狱的委婉说法。这正是以色列带给黎巴嫩基督徒的。这些是被谋杀的平民……用的是美国武器和美国纳税人的钱。这一切都因针对平民的‘永恒黑暗行动’而停止。

text: Launches from Hezbollah
text_zh: 真主党发射行动

text: Tucker Carlson: Israel is your client state. This is like taking orders from your housekeeper, which you would never do. Why can’t the United States get its proxy, its client state… under control? Why can’t this president or any president say no to Israel? We have a right to know why. There are… a lot of people in the White House who care about the United States.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：以色列是你的附庸国。这就像听从你家保姆的命令，而你绝不会这样做。为什么美国不能控制其代理人、其附庸国……？为什么这位总统或任何总统都不能对以色列说不？我们有权知道原因。白宫里有很多……关心美国的人。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation will be in Islamabad for talks tonight — Iran's ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam “Despite skepticism of Iranian public opinion due to repeated ceasefire violations by Israeli regime”" 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim on X: "Iran's ambassador to Pakistan deleted his tweet regarding the planned arrival of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad , the capital of Pakistan." Original post: https://x.com/IranAmbPak/status/2042108345121968376
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench镜像：“🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡进行会谈——伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使雷扎·阿米里·穆加达姆 ‘尽管伊朗公众因以色列政权屡次违反停火而持怀疑态度’ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim在X上报道：‘伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使删除了关于伊朗代表团计划抵达巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡的推文。’ 原帖：https://x.com/IranAmbPak/status/2042108345121968376

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah: Israeli forces located inside a house in the Al-Tyeba were targeted by a missile, resulting in casualties.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 真主党：位于阿尔泰巴一处房屋内的以色列部队遭到导弹袭击，造成人员伤亡。

text: Former Israeli PM Naftali Bennett: The goals of the war were clear: the complete and permanent dismantling of the Iranian nuclear program… These goals were not achieved. Failure will leave Israel facing a more vengeful and determined Iran that will race toward a nuclear weapon. All their empty promises have blown up in our faces. A government that dismantles Israel from within cannot defeat the enemy from the outside.
text_zh: 以色列前总理纳夫塔利·本内特：战争目标明确：彻底且永久性解除伊朗核计划…这些目标未能实现。失败将使以色列面对一个更具报复心、更坚定的伊朗，其将加速推进核武器研发。所有空洞承诺都已在我们面前破灭。一个从内部瓦解以色列的政府，无法从外部击败敌人。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan says the Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad tonight for “serious talks” based on the 10 points proposed by Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan has deleted his tweet saying the Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad tonight for “serious talks”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使表示，伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡，基于伊朗提出的10点方案进行‘严肃会谈’。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使已删除其推文，该推文称伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡进行‘严肃会谈’。@wfwitness

text: Shut out of U.S.–Iran peace talks, Israel is heavily striking Lebanon. At least 254 people have been killed and over 1,000 wounded, with some estimates putting the death toll closer to 300 just since yesterday. By relentlessly attacking Lebanon without distinguishing between military and civilian targets, Israel seems to be deliberately trying to force Iran to retaliate and become the party that violates the ceasefire.
text_zh: 被排除在美伊和谈之外，以色列正对黎巴嫩发动猛烈打击。自昨日以来，至少254人死亡，超过1000人受伤，部分估计死亡人数接近300。以色列不分军事与民用目标持续攻击黎巴嫩，似乎有意迫使伊朗报复，从而成为破坏停火的一方。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 CNA: The Philippines has opened its first dedicated coast guard command on Thitu (Pagasa) Island in the disputed Spratly Islands, covering 68,000 sq km. The base will include a commodore-level commander, permanent ship, response vessels, specialists, and a dredged port for docking. Pagasa Island is home to about 400 Filipinos, mostly fishermen and their families, whom China claims are living there illegally. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 亚洲新闻台：菲律宾已在争议南沙群岛的中业岛（帕加萨岛）开设首个专用海警指挥中心，管辖面积达6.8万平方公里。该基地将设准将级指挥官、常驻舰艇、应急船只、专业人员及疏浚港口供停泊。帕加萨岛居住约400名菲律宾人，多为渔民及其家属，中国称其居住为非法。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “US must choose ceasefire or continued war via Israel. It cannot have both” — Iran’s FM Araghchi
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “美国必须选择停火或通过以色列继续战争，不可兼得”——伊朗外长阿拉格希

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation will be in Islamabad for talks tonight — Iran's ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam “Despite skepticism of Iranian public opinion due to repeated ceasefire violations by Israeli regime”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗代表团今晚将在伊斯兰堡进行会谈——伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使雷扎·阿米里·穆加达姆表示：“尽管由于以色列政权一再违反停火协议，伊朗公众舆论持怀疑态度”

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ #Summary for the morning of April 9, 2026 ▪️ In Krasnodar Region, a man was killed in Sauk-Dere, UAVs crashed in Mekkertsuk and damaged a house in Slavyansk-na-Kubani. Enemy claims the target was a pipeline facility. Zelensky mentioned a ceasefire. UAVs were destroyed in Rostov Region. ▪️ Russian forces struck merchant vessels in Izmail, Odesa Region. Explosions occurred in Odesa, Pavlograd, Sumy and Kharkiv regions. ▪️ In Bryansk Region, the AFU attacked Demyanki, wounding a Bryanskenergo employee. A civilian was wounded in Novy Ropsk. ▪️ In Sumy, Grouping North achieved tactical successes, capturing an AFU soldier. ▪️ In Belgorod Region, civilians were wounded by drone strikes in Grayvoron, Shebekino and Belgorod. ▪️ In Kharkiv, Russian forces are advancing with heavy fighting in the Volchansk direction. ▪️ In Kupiansk, Russian forces are achieving success south of Pischane. ▪️ In Slavyansk, the AFU is counterattacking in Lipovka, while Russian forces are advancing south of Kaleniki. ▪️ In Dobropolsk, fighting continues in Novoaleksandrivka and Vasylivka. ▪️ In Dnipropetrovsk, the AFU's 82nd Brigade counterattacked but lost an APC. ▪️ In Zaporizhia, Grouping East is penetrating the enemy defense to free settlements. ▪️ On the Zaporizhia front, fighting continues in Primorsk and Stepnohirsk. ▪️ In Kherson, civilians were wounded, and Russian forces are striking with FAB-3000 and thermobaric munitions. Summary compiled by: Two Majors Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转自英文版Rybar：转自@ #2026年4月9日上午摘要 ▪️ 在克拉斯诺达尔地区，索克-杰雷一名男子死亡，无人机在梅克尔楚克坠毁，并在斯拉维扬斯克-纳-库巴尼损坏了一栋房屋。敌方声称目标是管道设施。泽连斯基提及停火。无人机在罗斯托夫地区被摧毁。▪️ 俄罗斯军队袭击了敖德萨地区伊兹梅尔的商船。敖德萨、巴甫洛格勒、苏梅和哈尔科夫地区发生爆炸。▪️ 在布良斯克地区，乌克兰武装部队袭击了杰米扬基，导致一名布良斯克能源公司员工受伤。新罗普斯克一名平民受伤。▪️ 在苏梅，北方集团取得战术成功，俘获一名乌克兰武装部队士兵。▪️ 在别尔哥罗德地区，无人机袭击导致格雷沃龙、舍别基诺和别尔哥罗德的平民受伤。▪️ 在哈尔科夫，俄罗斯军队在沃尔昌斯克方向激烈交战中推进。▪️ 在库皮扬斯克，俄罗斯军队在皮夏涅以南取得进展。▪️ 在斯拉维扬斯克，乌克兰武装部队在利波夫卡进行反击，而俄罗斯军队则在卡列尼基以南推进。▪️ 在多布罗波利斯克，新亚历山德里夫卡和瓦西里夫卡的战斗仍在继续。▪️ 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克，乌克兰武装部队第82旅进行反击，但损失了一辆装甲运兵车。▪️ 在扎波罗热，东方集团正渗透敌方防线以解放定居点。▪️ 在扎波罗热前线，普里莫尔斯克和斯捷波诺希尔斯的战斗仍在继续。▪️ 在赫尔松，平民受伤，俄罗斯军队使用FAB-3000和温压弹药进行打击。摘要编制者：两位少校 原始信息
